_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
description: Choose your ending
Two Gods Ending is both Elden Beast and Promised Consort Radahn
!DLC MUST BE ENABLED FOR DLC GOALS!

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: How many Great Runes are needed to challenge the Elden Beast
How many Great Runes are needed to enter Leyndell
Determines whether the Grand Lift of Rold is accessed using Great Runes, if the Rold Medallion is given by Melina after killing Morgott (vanilla), or randomized into the pool
How many Great Runes are needed to open the Grand Lift of Rold
This does nothing if Rold Medallion is set to 'Item'
Determines how the game expects you to be locked behind Max Rune Levels and Max Stone Levels
'All Locations' logically gates all locations in a region until you have the expected levels and stones
'Boss Locations' only logically gates Major Bosses locations in a region until you have the expected levels and stones
Bosses that block non-boss locations and travel between areas are taken into logic
if enabled, shop locations are added into the pool
Enabling this option adds useful items to the pool
If enabled, Golden Seed locations are added into the pool
Enabling this option adds useful items to the pool
If enabled, Sacred Tear locations are added into the pool
Enabling this option adds useful items to the pool
If enabled, Overworld Dragon Boss locations are added into the pool
Enabling this option adds useful items to the pool
If enabled, Painting locations are added into the pool
Enabling this option adds useful items to the pool
If enabled, Rise reward locations are added into the pool
Enabling this option adds useful items to the pool
If enabled, Great Runes are placed at vanilla locations
If enabled, the Academy Glintstone Key is placed in Sphere 1
If no optional base game locations are enabled and region locking is set to all, it will be placed in its vanilla location
If enabled, the abduction into Volcano Manor from Raya Lucaria puts Godskin Noble and Rykard in logic without Drawing Room Key
A jump into lava from the rocks near where you spawn lets you access the route to these bosses
If enabled, DLC Major Boss and Key Item Locations are added into the pool
Determines how the game expects you to be locked behind Max Scadu Level and Max Ash Level
'All Locations' logically gates all locations in a region until you have the expected levels
'Boss Locations' only logically gates Major Bosses locations in a region until you have the expected levels
Bosses that block non-boss locations and travel between areas are taken into logic
Important! The vast majority of the DLC is accessible without needing to kill bosses. Use at your discretion!
If enabled, DLC Scadutree Fragment Locations are added into the pool
Enabling this option adds useful items to the pool
Does nothing if DLC is not enabled
If enabled, DLC Revered Spirit Ash Locations are added into the pool
Enabling this option adds useful items to the pool
Does nothing if DLC is not enabled
Determines whether Messmers Kindling is divided into Messmers Kindling Shards, placed in its vanilla location, or a randomized item
Determines how many Messmers Kindling Shards are in the item pool
Does nothing if Messmers_Kindling_Setting is set to vanilla or randomized item
Can fail to generate with too few locations enabled
Determines how many Messmers Kindling Shards are needed to burn the sealing tree and access Enir-Ilim
Does nothing if Messmers_Kindling_Setting is set to vanilla or randomized item
Can fail to generate with too few locations enabled
